name: Beacon Lighting Group Limited
analysis: BLX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.7400, stop A$1.4306, target A$2.6155 (2.83:1) — then trail it.
